backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining diagram state types (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels), user profiles, and CRUD operations for diagrams with authorization checks using MixinAuthorization and MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five features: replacing user icon with man icon, adding multiple users and multiple computers icons, enabling arrow rotation, and removing PNG export functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, utilities, and configuration for the threat hunting portal with attack path visualization.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for a security-focused dark blue/teal palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Portal application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/index.ts: Example code snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG images.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication, profile setup modal, and protected routes for report and attack path pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component handling icon placement with resize, connection creation with rotation, drawing modes (freehand, line, arrow), eraser, text labels with multi-line support, transform tool, and element selection with drag-and-drop functionality.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: Renders an SVG connector line with an arrowhead between two points on an attack path diagram, supporting rotation, selection state, and click interactions. Calculates geometry for shortened lines, arrow angles, and includes an invisible wider hitbox for easier clicking.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Displays draggable icons for attack path elements (users, computers, files, etc.) by mapping icon types to image assets. Supports drag-and-drop functionality to place icons on the canvas.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a sidebar toolbar with draggable attack path icons, drawing tool buttons (freehand, line, arrow, eraser, text, move), and diagram management actions (undo, save, load, clear). Includes text formatting controls for color and font size selection.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation (Reports, Attack Path, New Report), user profile display, login button, hero banner on homepage, and footer. Provides consistent structure across all pages.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Modal dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams, displaying a list with metadata (icon count, connections, last modified date) and delete functionality. Includes confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button that clears Internet Identity authentication and query cache when clicked. Only displays when user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen with branding and Internet Identity authentication button. Displays loading state during authentication and security messaging about threat intelligence data protection.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A React component providing a searchable dropdown for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques with support for custom technique entries, displaying technique IDs, names, and descriptions with badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for threat hunt reports using the browser's print dialog, with loading state and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name for profile setup, preventing dismissal until completed.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component for saving attack path diagrams with a name input field and save/cancel actions.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing an array of MITRE ATT&CK techniques with IDs, names, and descriptions covering tactics like Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, creating anonymous or authenticated actors and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: A custom hook managing state for an attack path diagram editor, including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, drawing tools, selection state, and undo history with operations for adding, moving, resizing, and removing elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook that deletes a diagram by ID via the actor and invalidates the 'allDiagrams' query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is available and not fetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile, with custom loading state that accounts for actor initialization status.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single diagram by ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines report-related React Query hooks (get all, get by ID, save, delete) that are currently disabled/stubbed since backend no longer supports report functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile via the actor and invalidates the 'currentUserProfile' query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a diagram with name and state, invalidating both 'diagramState' and 'allDiagrams' query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including primary, secondary, destructive, and chart color definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Main page component for creating attack path diagrams with toolbar, canvas, and dialogs for saving/loading diagrams; manages diagram state including icons, connections, drawings, and text labels.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component for creating threat hunt reports with a form that submits report data via useSaveReport mutation (currently non-functional as backend doesn't support reports).
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays detailed view of a threat hunt report including executive summary, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, and remediation actions with PDF download capability.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a paginated table of threat hunting reports with metadata (title, author, date, techniques, IOCs), supporting view, delete, and PDF export actions.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas library type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jspdf library type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates a printable HTML document in a new window for threat hunting reports, including metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and analysis sections with styled formatting.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme properties for sidebar/chart components, custom animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canister IDs, API proxy to local DFX network, and build optimizations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for an attack path visualizer feature, listing pending requirements for icon replacements (man, multiple users, multiple computers), arrow rotation functionality, and PNG export removal.
